result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
Result 0 is the seminal Nature Machine Intelligence perspective paper by Geirhos et al. (2020) that formally introduces and defines "shortcut learning" as a fundamental failure mode in deep neural networks. It perfectly aligns with the workshop's focus on real-world pitfalls by explaining how models exploit spurious dataset correlations that perform well on benchmarks but fail catastrophically in deployment. This paper will be cited to introduce a core theoretical concept, support arguments about the brittleness of accuracy-centric training, and highlight the research gap regarding robust, causally-aligned learning paradigms. The other results are either domain-specific applications or focused on narrow mitigation techniques, making 0 the ideal foundational citation.
